result.summary: A temporary ceasefire has been announced for the Orthodox Easter weekend, but military desertions and fatigue are growing concerns in Ukraine's war-torn country.
result.reasoning: The risk level is assigned as MEDIUM due to the temporary ceasefire announcement, which may provide a brief respite from fighting, but also highlights the ongoing challenges faced by Ukraine's military.

signals.text: Putin announces 32-hour ceasefire in Russia-Ukraine war for Orthodox Easter weekend

best.description: A brief and temporary reduction in violence, followed by a return to fighting

likely.description: An extended ceasefire, potentially leading to negotiations and a peaceful resolution

worst.description: A prolonged and bloody conflict, with little hope for a peaceful resolution

sources.name: GNews
sources.title: Putin announces 32-hour ceasefire in Russia-Ukraine war for Orthodox Easter weekend
